mapper.insert: insert into wf_historic_task (id, instance_id, task_name, display_name, task_type, perform_type, task_state, operator, create_time, finish_Time, expire_time, action_url, parent_task_id, variable) values(#{id}, #{instanceId}, #{taskName}, #{displayName}, #{taskType}, #{performType}, #{taskState}, #{operator}, #{createTime}, #{finishTime}, #{expireTime}, #{actionUrl}, #{parentTaskId}, #{variable})
mapper.select: select id, instance_id, task_name, display_name, task_type, perform_type, task_state, operator, create_time, finish_Time, expire_time, action_url, parent_task_id, variable from wf_historic_task where id = #{id}

select id, instance_id, task_name, display_name, task_type, perform_type, task_state, operator, create_time, finish_Time, expire_time, action_url, parent_task_id, variable from wf_historic_task where instance_id = #{instanceId}
